summary: Per-drive menu bar free space, health score with numeric label, and full process names in system status.
introduced: Choose internal and external drives individually for menu bar free-space readouts (for example, HD 12GB or 6 2.8TB)
changed: Health menu bar icon shows condition with score, for example Fair (50)
System status top CPU and memory lists use full application names from Activity Monitor
fixed: Top CPU and memory process names no longer truncate to short comm labels like Cu or Library
